welcome.title: Welcome to VaultSync
welcome.subtitle: Your personal password manager. Let's start by creating your vault.

setPassword.title: Create your master password
setPassword.body: This password unlocks your vault. There is no automatic recovery — keep it safe.
setPassword.hintWarning: The hint is stored in plain text. Don't write the password here.
setPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

recoveryCode.title: Recovery code
recoveryCode.body: Write this down on paper or in a physically safe place. If you forget your master password, this is the only way to recover your vault.
recoveryCode.warning: Don't screenshot. Don't save in a file on this phone.
recoveryCode.savedCheckbox: I confirm I have saved this code safely

biometric.title: Enable biometric
biometric.body: Use your fingerprint or face to unlock quickly. Master password is still required after reboot.

driveSignin.title: Connect Google Drive
driveSignin.body: VaultSync syncs one encrypted file to your Google account. Only this file is visible to the app.
